title: Restructure features to per-file form, drop -NNN suffix
description: Replace feature_list.json (single shared array, source of every parallel-branch merge conflict) with a features/ directory of one JSON file per feature. Drop the -NNN suffix from feature IDs in favour of <category>-<slug> (e.g. `harness-init`, `ci-actions`). Update the validator, the CI invariants check, docs, and PROGRESS.md.
verification: features/ directory exists with one .json file per feature
scripts/feature-list-check.js reads from features/ and enforces filename==id
Feature id regex matches <category>-<slug>, rejects the old -NNN form
scripts/harness-ci-checks.sh branch-name regex matches new <type>/<feature-id> shape
scripts/harness-ci-checks.sh feature-id existence check looks at features/
docs/HARNESS.md Naming standard section is updated
On this branch, scripts/harness-ci-checks.sh passes for branch chore/harness-features
notes: Single PR per user's request. PR #5 (docs-template, was docs-001) is still open against the old format; after this lands, that PR needs a small rebase to (1) rename its feature id, (2) move from feature_list.json to features/docs-template.json. Mechanical.
